message:
refactor: Consolidate JSON parsing primitives to shared module

- Create packages/shared/json/primitives.zig with optimized implementations
- Consolidate unescapeString (6 → 2 copies) with lookup tables and bulk copy
- Consolidate parseNumber to use shared primitives across all JSON parsers
- Delete duplicate json_impl/simd/ folder (4 files), use shared/json/simd/
- Export simd module from json.zig for runtime access

Net reduction: 1217 lines removed across 17 files
